name: con-runrecord
notes: The run-record parser accepts a genuine recorded record and rejects one with an unknown closed-enum value. A real run is recorded, then its stored record parses cleanly (expectError:false). The single observation's verdict is then edited to a value outside the canonical verdict enum (pass|fail|error|skip|xfail|xpass|not_run); re-parsing MUST be a hard error.
